typography: handwritten script headers with clean body
hero_layout: stacked cinematic — big fullscreen text with scroll cue
hero_background: large faded typography watermark in background
hero_cta_style: floating action buttons with hover effects
nav_style: fixed top bar — always visible on scroll
scroll_animation: moderate — staggered entrance of cards and elements
hover_effects: subtle — slight lift or color shift on cards
footer_style: playful — with an emoji or easter egg
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
quirk: use a prominent horizontal rule / divider design motif
